ACTSFROMTHEPAST-BURN_BRIGHT.title: Burn Bright
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-BURN_BRIGHT.description: This card's attack damage is doubled and removed from your [gold]Deck[/gold] after [blue]5[/blue] combats.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-FEARFUL.title: Fearful
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-FEARFUL.description: Triples [gold]Block[/gold] gained from this card. When this card is played, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-HAUNTED.title: Haunted
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-HAUNTED.description: Whenever you draw this card, gain [purple]Ringing[/purple]. When this card is played, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Intangible[/gold].
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-HAUNTED.extraCardText:
Whenever you draw this card, gain Ringing.
Gain 1 Intangible.
